extraction.one_line_summary: TARAMAY Rein won from the breakaway on Picon Blanco, taking red jersey while MOSS Enrique gained crucial seconds attacking solo inside 50m to go.
tactical_patterns: Movistar held power until final kilometer then MOSS attacked at 50m, catching ROGLIC unable to respond after pacing.
Jumbo-Visma allowed 2:30 gap to breakaway riders low on GC, strategically avoiding red jersey defense duties early Vuelta.
VALVERDE set tempo for MOSS's final attack rather than LOPEZ, reversing expected Movistar hierarchy on Picon Blanco finish.

rider_signals.MOSS Enrique: positive: Best acceleration in lead group, took time on ROGLIC with late attack despite Roglic marking LOPEZ
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost over a minute on mountaintop finish despite being Olympic champion, major early GC blow
rider_signals.KUS Sepp: negative: Rough day on first summit finish, disappeared from lead group despite being noted pre-race climber
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Lost significant time on first categorized summit, undermining Astana GC ambitions
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Chased MOSS acceleration alone, showing willingness to race aggressively for Ineos despite BERNAL presence
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: Marked wheels rather than initiating, preserving position but ceding time bonuses to MOSS
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Set tempo for team at crucial moment despite age, enabled MOSS attack rather than fading late
